strengths: ~20 years of continuous engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Founding and sustaining GISCollective since 2016 demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and ability to ship an open-source platform end-to-end
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), showing recent engagement with the AI tooling space
concerns: AI expertise is at most 2 months old (April 2025 to present); no prior AI/ML work, no recognized AI products or platforms, and no Master's/PhD in an AI-related field
Cloud exposure is narrow and operational (AWS CDK for pricing, Kubernetes for a side project) — no evidence of cloud platform strategy, architecture at scale, or advisory work
No evidence of Director-level scope: no strategic customer advisory, no cross-org technical leadership, and no documented influence beyond team- or workshop-level
response.justification: The role is explicitly an AI Strategy principal at Director-level IC scope, requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI product delivery. Bogdan's résumé shows strong generalist engineering over ~20 years, but his only AI-adjacent experience is a two-month-old staff role at re:cinq involving MCP tooling — insufficient evidence of the depth, recognition, or platform-scale delivery the role demands. Cloud experience is similarly narrow (AWS CDK in a pricing team, Kubernetes on a personal OSS project), with no indication of cloud strategy advisory. There is no graduate AI education, no history of advising strategic customers or partners, and the seniority ceiling visible in the résumé is Staff Software Engineer, not a Director-level IC. The entrepreneurial thread (GISCollective, WatchUp) is a genuine positive but does not compensate for the core gaps in AI expertise and strategic leadership.
